title: Wireless Design, Configuration, and Validation · Incident Case: Net Wifi Channels Width
summary: Design staff, guest, and point-to-point wireless service across crowded, regulated, and mobile spaces. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net wifi channels width increment in a secure wireless survey and deployment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose channel, width, reuse, and band steering from regulatory domain, overlap, contention, capacity, and coverage.
Compare relevant 802.11 capabilities across 2.4, 5, and 6 GHz bands, channel availability, range, and client support.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
